_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The administrative fine procedure delegated act is operationally significant: until it is published, the calculation methodology for fines beyond the €30,000 per-vehicle ceiling stated in Article 13f(1) is not fully specified.
prior.source_span: The administrative fines shall be effective, proportionate and dissuasive and shall not exceed EUR 30 000 for each heavy-duty vehicle concerned by deviating or delayed data as referred to in points (a) and (b).
